authorized_by: owner rulings 2026-07-20 (docs/review/comments.md): RC-1 adopted, RC-2 three-state model adopted (sector/beta FAIL-CLOSED), RC-3 confirmed, RC-4 confirmed, daily NAV marking = official open-to-open, sector/beta ambiguity CLOSED.
boundary: No sealed data read; no signal/residual/z/volatility computation; no performance. Governance record only.

candidate_schema.fail_closed: missing/duplicate candidate_id; INTEGRITY_STOP:CANDIDATE_SIGMA_RESID_INVALID on bad sigma; missing sector_id/beta when the constraint applies; non-finite signal/exposure input; unknown configuration_id; eligibility_status not in the closed enum

field_semantics.eligibility_evidence_identity: identity binding the upstream frozen eligibility assessment (Increment 3 consumes, never reconstructs earnings/merger/split/delisting/gap/liquidity)
field_semantics.permanent_security_id: permanent security identifier (NOT candidate_id); final tie-break by lexical byte ordering
field_semantics.registered_sigma_resid: upstream-registered 60-session volatility of the registered 5-session residual for that candidate+session; strictly positive finite; NOT computed by Increment 3
field_semantics.registered_signal_value: residual z; used for Z_entry threshold AND |z| ordering/tie-breaks
field_semantics.signal_origin_session: signal age; older signal = smaller signal_origin_session (removal tie-break)

next: Commit this resolution + the promoted binding registry -> THEN Increment 3 implementation (identity-bound loader -> candidate schema -> inverse-vol+normalization -> entry-neutral target -> pos/sector/beta cascade -> pending+exits-first state -> Increment-2 execution integration (preview->verify->commit) -> three-state exposure evidence -> official-open daily NAV/returns -> Increment-1 metric/report integration -> synthetic qualification).
promotes: MR002_Increment3_RuleRegistry_Draft_v1.0 (DRAFT_NON_BINDING) -> MR002_Increment3_RuleRegistry_v1.0 (IMPLEMENTATION_BINDING) whose bytes include these rulings

reason_codes.INTEGRITY_STOP:CANDIDATE_INVERSE_VOL_MIS: candidate-provided inverse disagrees with the recomputed 1/registered_sigma_resid beyond the frozen tolerance
reason_codes.INTEGRITY_STOP:HELD_POSITION_OPEN_MARK_M: a held position has no official open mark on a session and the frozen source supplies no held-position mark rule
reason_codes.INTEGRITY_STOP:REALIZED_BETA_CONSTRAINT: post-execution realized |Sum w_i beta_i|/gross > 0.10 (gross-normalized ratio worsened by asymmetric clipping; no registered repair -> fail closed)
reason_codes.INTEGRITY_STOP:REALIZED_GROSS_CONSTRAINT: post-execution realized gross exceeds 100% NAV (impossible under reduce-only clipping -> defect)
reason_codes.INTEGRITY_STOP:REALIZED_SECTOR_CONSTRAIN: post-execution realized sector net (>5% gross) or sector gross (>20% gross) exceeded (gross-normalized ratio worsened by asymmetric clipping; no registered repair -> fail closed)
reason_codes.INTEGRITY_STOP:REALIZED_SINGLE_NAME_CONS: post-execution realized per-name market value exceeds 1.5% NAV (impossible under reduce-only clipping -> defect)
reason_codes.N_A_EMPTY_PORTFOLIO: realized gross = 0: all cash; beta numerator = 0; normalized beta = N_A_EMPTY_PORTFOLIO; beta passes vacuously (no division by zero / no infinity)
reason_codes.REFUSED_CODE_OR_DATA_IDENTITY:NAV_IDENTI: construction NAV and execution-layer NAV differ within the order cycle

registry_status_updates.tie_break_field_mapping: removal tie-break -> signal_origin_session (older signal); drift-repair tie-break -> held-position entry session (oldest position, from Increment-2 state); both final -> permanent_security_id lexical byte ordering

RC-1_sizing_interface.disposition: Each candidate carries registered_sigma_resid (upstream-registered 60-session vol of the registered 5-session residual). Increment 3 computes ONLY q_i = 1/registered_sigma_resid then the frozen within-side normalization. Increment 3 may NOT estimate residuals/volatility, reconstruct the 60-session window, substitute cross-sectional volatility, winsorize/floor/impute sigma. Fail closed on missing/boolean/non-numeric/non-finite/zero/negative -> INTEGRITY_STOP:CANDIDATE_SIGMA_RESID_INVALID.

inverse_vol_tolerance.note: Pinned to a specific frozen relative tolerance (1e-12) per the owner 'exact or frozen-tolerance' allowance, so the mismatch trigger is well-defined; the optional field is never used in the math.
inverse_vol_tolerance.policy: The evaluator ALWAYS computes q_i = 1/registered_sigma_resid and uses that value in the weighting; a candidate-provided registered_inverse_vol_weight is EVIDENCE ONLY.

RC-2_target_vs_executed.atomicity: PREVIEW -> VERIFY -> COMMIT: preview execution -> realized-constraint verification -> commit ledger and portfolio state ONLY if verification passes. A failed preview may appear in evidence as a REFUSED replay, but its fills MUST NOT enter the accepted synthetic portfolio state. Evaluator atomicity only (not a claim a live broker can cancel observed fills; operational partial-fill handling is outside Increment 3).
RC-2_target_vs_executed.cascade_binds: INTENDED_TARGET (position cap -> sector caps -> beta limit -> nothing else); removals only during construction; removed capacity -> cash; remaining weights not increased
RC-2_target_vs_executed.dry_run_identity: the dry-run MUST use the same official-open prices, ADV, NAV identity, rounding, share clipping, and missing-open handling as the emitted execution ledger
RC-2_target_vs_executed.empty_portfolio: realized gross = 0: all cash; beta numerator = 0; normalized beta = N_A_EMPTY_PORTFOLIO; beta passes vacuously (no division by zero / no infinity)
RC-2_target_vs_executed.execution: Increment 2 applies min(intended shares, 2% ADV, 1.5% NAV executable, official-open availability); may reduce or cancel, NEVER enlarge
on_realized_violation: do NOT substitute a lower-ranked candidate
do NOT invent a next-session sector or beta repair

post_execution_disposition.dollar_neutrality: NOT fail-closed on unequal realized long/short gross: within 5% of gross -> accept; outside -> record drift and generate the frozen next-open reduction instruction through the normal replay lifecycle (the ONLY registered later repair)

RC-2_target_vs_executed.rationale: sector/beta are gross-normalized ratios that asymmetric clipping can worsen with no absolute increase; only net-dollar drift has a registered repair, so carrying+repairing a post-clip sector/beta violation would introduce an unregistered economic rule -> fail closed.
required_sequence: produce INTENDED_TARGET satisfying every frozen constraint

RC-3_pending_exits.disposition: A deferred exit remains an OPEN position until it fills, consuming shares/market value/gross/net/sector/beta/one-position-per-symbol occupancy/capital; symbol ineligible for a new entry; no new sizing/renormalization (shares fixed). Processed BEFORE new entries every subsequent session; if no valid official open again, remains pending WITHOUT producing duplicate exit orders. Confirmation of combined frozen rules, not a new economic rule.

RC-4_1.5pct_two_layer.disposition: One economic limit, two enforcement stages. Construction: intended per-name MV <= 1.5% NAV. Execution: filled = min(intended shares, 2% ADV shares, 1.5% NAV shares); NO second 98.5% multiplier - verify+clip against the same absolute cap. One common NAV identity for construction and execution within the order cycle; if they differ before the open -> REFUSED_CODE_OR_DATA_IDENTITY:NAV_IDENTITY_MISMATCH. Clipped capacity -> cash, never reassigned.

daily_nav_marking.close_marked: close-to-close/close-marked results only if a separately authorized diagnostic requires them; MUST NOT feed Sharpe/DSR/stationary-bootstrap/Calmar/MaxDD/annualized-return/gate verdicts
daily_nav_marking.disposition: Official-open-to-official-open marking on the registered session calendar for the primary daily portfolio-return series.
daily_nav_marking.first_session: the prior NAV comes from the immediately preceding required warm-up/open state; do NOT create a zero-return first observation because the scoring window starts there
daily_nav_marking.missing_mark: held position with valid carried holding but no official open mark -> use the frozen missing-open rule; do NOT forward-fill/close/midpoint/unregistered-vendor; where the frozen source supplies no held-position mark rule -> INTEGRITY_STOP:HELD_POSITION_OPEN_MARK_MISSING. Exit deferral alone does not authorize substituting another valuation field.
daily_nav_marking.price_identity: split-adjusted, non-dividend-adjusted, official regular-session opening price, registered session index; NO close/synthetic-midpoint in the primary series
daily_nav_marking.return_formula: r_s = NAV_s / NAV_{s-1} - 1 (both NAVs at their respective registered official opens)
valuation_sequence: begin with positions carried from the prior session
apply exits scheduled for official open s
apply eligible entries scheduled for official open s
apply all entry/exit costs at that open
value every remaining open position at official open s
carry cash with zero return in the primary result
record NAV_s after open executions and costs
